kw.msg: Fills the text 'testiuser' in the given field.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: Evaluating expression "document.querySelector('#nav-login-form').requestSubmit()" failed: NameError: name 'document' is not defined nor importable as module

kw.status: Evaluating expression "document.querySelector('#nav-login-form').requestSubmit()" failed: NameError: name 'document' is not defined nor importable as module

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
